scope: TG-P14 AMD recovery and pure attention landing

default_off_census.note: Default path composition unchanged (5 known non-tinygrad kernels are the pinned debt). The REDUCE_ACC_UPCAST_FIX passes are env-gated default-off and AMD-gated, so they add nothing to the default path.

protected_routes_fix_on.route: Q4_K G3 decode GEMV + owned HIP attention (default path)
protected_routes_fix_on.kind: deterministic teacher-forced NLL over fixed corpus

crash_found_and_fixed.symptom: With REDUCE_ACC_UPCAST_FIX=1 the pass crashed model-wide at tinygrad/codegen/late/devectorizer.py:475 -- AssertionError: can't vectorize dtypes.float.vec(4) with size 4.
crash_found_and_fixed.root_cause: reduce_acc_upcast_fix assumed reg.dtype.base is scalar (count==1) and called sdt.vec(W); the full model contains a matched reduce whose accumulator base is already float.vec(4). The isolated P10 repro never exercised that shape.
crash_found_and_fixed.fix: Added a fail-closed guard 'if sdt.count != 1: continue' -- the pass only widens genuine scalar-REG accumulators; already-vectorized accumulators are left untouched. Generic, no kernel-name branch (P14.4 allowed fix class #3/#5).
crash_found_and_fixed.post_fix_verification: P11 4/4 ok, P10 4/4 ok, NLL bit-identical fix-off==fix-on.

non_determinism_finding.issue: This tool jumps straight to decode at start_pos=CK with a single input token and never prefills the KV cache, so attention reads uninitialized KV memory. Three runs of the identical config (dirty tree, fix-off, CK=4096) produced three different token lists (including one all-151936 out-of-vocab garbage sample). Its docstring assumes determinism, but that holds only with a populated KV cache.
non_determinism_finding.consequence: All qk_decode_token_match_check.py fix-off vs fix-on comparisons in this phase were non-deterministic noise and were discarded. The deterministic authority is qk_nll_eval.py (teacher-forced over a fixed corpus), which is bit-identical fix-off==fix-on.
non_determinism_finding.recommendation: Do not use qk_decode_token_match_check.py without a prefill step; prefer qk_nll_eval.py for default-path token/logit equivalence.

coupled_changes_required_for_p10.codegen: tinygrad/codegen/late/devectorizer.py + tinygrad/codegen/__init__.py -> makes the split-preserving combine COMPILE
coupled_changes_required_for_p10.kernel_builder: extra/qk_live_split_geometry.py (gacc init-dependency refactor + opts_to_apply=() on flash_fused_gmax_combine_kernel) -> makes it NUMERICALLY CORRECT
coupled_changes_required_for_p10.evidence: With qk_live_split_geometry.py reverted to HEAD but the codegen fix present, P10 shared_weight_combine and fused_gmax_combine regress to numeric_ok=False. Both changes are jointly required and must be committed together.
coupled_changes_required_for_p10.model_safety: model.py imports only flash_decode_live_split_block_tile (unchanged) from that file, and it is default-off; the NLL is bit-identical, so the default model path is unaffected.
